title: lithocardium obscurum
intro: Lithocardium obscurum, a plant species native to the Mediterranean region, is defined as a shrub with dark green, lance-shaped leaves and small white flowers. The medicinal properties of Lithocardium obscurum lie in its ability to act as a natural vasodilator, reducing blood pressure and heart rate. Its health benefits include improving cardiovascular health, reducing the risk of heart disease, and helping to manage symptoms of hypertension. Herbal preparations of Lithocardium obscurum can be found in tea, tincture, and capsule form, with recommended dosages typically ranging from 100 to 500 milligrams per day.
